title: ilex harmandiana
intro: Ilex harmandiana, also known as the Chinese holly, is a species of evergreen tree or shrub native to southwestern China. The plant has been used in traditional Chinese medicine for its medicinal properties, which include anti-inflammatory, antioxidant, and antimicrobial effects. The health benefits of Ilex harmandiana include reducing fever, relieving cough and sore throat, and improving cardiovascular health. Ilex harmandiana can be prepared into herbal teas, infusions, or decoctions, as well as being used in the form of dried leaves and berries in various herbal preparations.
